name: Curried Chicken Salad- Daley
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cubed chicken, peas, carrot, celery seed, raisins, shredded cabbage, apples, scallions, and celery in a salad bowl.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together nonfat yogurt, mayonnaise, curry powder, lemon juice, black pepper, Dijon mustard, and minced shallot until blended.
3. Pour the dressing over the chicken mixture and toss well to coat evenly.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 1 hour.
5. Place a cabbage leaf on each salad plate with the curved side down.
6. Mound the salad onto the leaves.
7. Garnish with cherry tomatoes and parsley before serving.
